verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Letting go of every single dream I lay each one down at Your feet Every moment of my wandering Never changes what You see

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: I've tried to win this war I confess My hands are weary I need Your rest Mighty Warrior, King of the fight No matter what I face, You're by my side

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: When You don't move the mountains I'm needing You to move When You don't part the waters I wish I could walk through When You don't give the answers as I cry out to You I will trust, I will trust, I will trust in You!

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Truth is, You know what tomorrow brings There's not a day ahead You have not seen So, in all things be my life and breath I want what You want Lord and nothing less

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: When You don't move the mountains I'm needing You to move When You don't part the waters I wish I could walk through When You don't give the answers as I cry out to You I will trust, I will trust, I will trust in You!

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: I will trust in You! You are my strength and comfort You are my steady hand You are my firm foundation; the rock on which I stand

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: Your ways are always higher Your plans are always good There's not a place where I'll go, You've not already stood

verse.name: V8
verse.lines: When You don't move the mountains I'm needing You to move When You don't part the waters I wish I could walk through When You don't give the answers as I cry out to You I will trust, I will trust, I will trust in You!

verse.name: V9
verse.lines: I will trust in You! I will trust in You! I will trust in You!
